title: Journal Entries Hub is Officially Live
excerpt: We have launched with over 70+ expert-verified journal entries covering IFRS, Tax, and SaaS accounting logic. Our goal is to standardize professional accounting resources for 2026.

title: Jordanian Income Tax Filing Deadline Reminder
excerpt: A reminder for firms in Jordan: The deadline for corporate income tax filing is approaching. Review our updated Tax pillar for Withholding and Social Security entry logic.

title: IFRS 16 Lease Modification Trends
excerpt: We are seeing an increase in lease modifications globally. Our Advanced pillar now includes a deep-dive on Right-of-Use asset impairment during mid-term renegotiations.
